message:
fix(index,lexical,rerank): harden error handling and add overflow protection

fsvi: Replace silent directory fsync failure with tracing::warn after
FSVI index write so durability-critical sync errors are observable.

lexical: Replace direct index access errors[0] with errors.first() for
lenient query parse warnings. Convert snippet generator creation from
silent .ok() to explicit match with debug logging on failure. Add debug
logging for missing document ID fields and metadata JSON deserialization
failures in both search and count paths, replacing silent empty-string
and None fallbacks.

rerank: Add checked_mul overflow protection for batch_size * seq_len
tensor allocation to prevent silent integer overflow when processing
adversarially large input batches, returning RerankFailed with a
descriptive error instead of allocating incorrect buffer sizes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
